name: test gemini api key
system_prompt:
Generate a high-quality professional portrait image of the guest.

Details:
- Focus on one person only.
- Center the person in the frame.
- Use a given background image
- Maintain realistic facial features.
- Proper lighting and sharp focus.
- Business or formal attire.
- No extra people in the frame.
- No distortion or overlapping elements.
- Professional conference vibe.
single_person_prompt:
Generate a high-quality professional conference photo using the provided images.

The uploaded images include:
- A user photo containing one person.
- One guest image.
- A background image is given to consider that image.

Instructions:
- Detect the person from the user photo and the person from the guest image.
- Place both individuals together naturally as if they are attending a conference event.
- Position them standing side by side in the provided background scene.
- Ensure both people appear balanced and properly aligned in the frame.

Requirements:
- Preserve the original facial features of both the user and the guest.
- Maintain natural body proportions and realistic posture.
- Ensure no facial distortion or identity changes.
- Avoid overlapping faces or unnatural spacing between the two people.
- Blend lighting, shadows, and perspective so both people match the background environment.

Important rules:
- Do not create additional people.
- Do not change facial identity or facial structure.
- Do not merge or distort faces.
- Ensure both individuals are clearly visible and properly framed.

Style:
Professional conference photo, realistic lighting, high resolution, sharp focus, cohesive composition.
multiple_person_prompt:
Generate a high-quality professional conference group photo using the provided images.

The uploaded images may include:
- A user photo that may contain one or multiple people.
- One or more guest images.
- A background image is given consider that.

Instructions:
- Detect all people present in the user photo and keep them in the final image.
- Include the selected guest(s) together with the people from the user photo.
- Arrange everyone naturally in a group as if attending a conference event.
- Place the selected guest(s) in the middle of the group composition when possible while keeping natural spacing and visibility.
- Place the group inside the provided background scene.

Requirements:
- Preserve the original facial features of all people from the user image and guest images.
- Maintain correct body proportions and natural positioning.
- Ensure no faces are cut or distorted.
- Avoid overlapping faces or unnatural spacing between people.
- Blend lighting, shadows, and perspective so all people match the background.

Important rules:
- Do not create additional people.
- Do not change or merge identities.
- Do not distort faces.
- Ensure all individuals are clearly visible.

Style:
Professional conference group photo, realistic lighting, high resolution, sharp focus, cohesive composition.
